MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To Conduct Financial Discovery On Defendants Essex Portfolio, L.P., A California Limited Liability Partnership; Essex Management Corporation, A California Corporation; And Essex Property Trust, Inc., A Maryland Corporation
Off Calendar Feb-27-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MARIO MONGE'S Motion For Leave Of Court To Conduct Financial Discovery On Defendants Essex Portfolio, L.P., A California Limited Liability Partnership; Essex Management Corporation, A California Corporation; And Essex Property Trust, Inc., A Maryland Corporation

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's motion for leave to conduct financial discovery is denied. Plaintiff has not shown that there is a substantial likelihood that he will be able to prove by clear and convincing evidence that the code violations were the result of malice or oppression by the defendants.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
